commands.review_summary:
The branch changes Tailscale helper parsing so noisy valid JSON is accepted for whois and Funnel status while malformed whois stays on the short error TTL path and malformed Funnel status is not treated as confirmed disabled state.

PR surface: Source +2, Tests +93. Total +95 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for source-level reproduction: mocked malformed stdout reaches current main's raw `ensureFunnel` parse and current main's catch-all Funnel route helper. I did not run a live Tailscale daemon repro because this is a read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - No automated repair is needed; the remaining action is maintainer review of the intentional compatibility/availability tradeoff plus normal merge gates.

target.title: fix(tailscale): preserve parse errors for malformed JSON
target.body:
Repair path for Clownfish cluster ghcrawl-156822-autonomous-smoke. This carries forward @franciscomaestre's #63321 work on Tailscale JSON resilience while addressing the review blockers: noisy valid JSON may be parsed through parsePossiblyNoisyJsonObject, but malformed whois output must remain on the short error TTL path and malformed funnel status must not be treated as confirmed disabled state. Base: main 9f32bea3970c71f922f4992a6d33a211e67c761e. Validate with pnpm -s vitest run src/infra/tailscale.test.ts and pnpm check:changed, then run Codex /review before merge.

Clownfish 🐠 replacement reef notes:
- Cluster: ghcrawl-156822-autonomous-smoke
- Source PRs: https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/63321
- Credit: Repair the existing #63321 contributor branch so @franciscomaestre keeps PR credit where possible.; If the executor must fall back to a replacement PR after an unrecoverable branch repair blocker, the replacement PR body and changelog note must credit @franciscomaestre and source PR https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/63321.
- Validation: pnpm -s vitest run src/infra/tailscale.test.ts; pnpm check:changed
- Repair fallback: source PR #63321 is a fork branch requiring rebase; use replacement branch because GitHub App pushes to contributor forks can be rejected when rebased upstream history includes workflow files

fish notes: model gpt-5.5, reasoning xhigh; reviewed against 70e334bb3661.
target.author: app/openclaw-clownfish
